title: Automated BI Reporting Framework
overview: Automated framework handling workbook migrations, schedule updates, and extract maintenance across environments using Python and Tableau REST API.
challenge: Manually publishing dozens of Tableau workbook edits across separate DEV/PROD sites was error-prone and took 10+ hours of team effort weekly.
solution: Programmed a Python command-line utility utilizing the Tableau Server Client (TSC) API to automate migrations and metadata validation.
archExplanation: Version controlled Tableau XML workbooks trigger GitHub Action runners. The Python TSC CLI utility publishes assets automatically to Tableau Cloud.
impact: Deployment times cut from 2 hours to 90 seconds
Saved 10 hours of manual administration weekly
learnings: Tableau workbook XML can be programmatically parsed and updated
Store connection passwords securely in Environment Secrets
